g.text: Concurrent Access Pattern: Mutex vs RWMutex

div.p:
T0: Reader1 acquires lock T1: Reader1 releases → Reader2 waits T2: Reader2 acquires lock
T3: Reader2 releases → Reader3 waits T4: Reader3 acquires lock
T0: Reader1,2,3 all RLock() T0: All read peer list simultaneously T1: All RUnlock()
Multiple goroutines can call these simultaneously without blocking
Writers get exclusive access. Readers blocked during write.

text.tspan: // READ operation — multiple concurrent readers OK
// READ operation — multiple concurrent readers OK

ul.li: Blocks while any Lock() is held
Use for: Get*, Size, Create*, All read-only ops
Blocks ALL RLock() and Lock() callers
Use for: Add*, Remove*, Set*, Update*, Merge*
